name: Dockerize Root Bot
description: Turns a Root community into a container-like environment using private channel groups, channels, terminal-style command messages, and SQLite state.

settings.name: Command prefix
settings.description: Text prefix used to run Dockerize commands in channels.

settings.name: Maximum channels per container
settings.description: Maximum number of channels a user container may contain.

settings.name: Default container visibility
settings.description: Whether new containers start private or public.

settings.name: Staff role
settings.description: Role that can inspect, suspend, and delete containers. Can also be set with dkz setup.

settings.name: Command channel
settings.description: Channel where normal Dockerize commands should be run. Can also be set with dkz setup.
